prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约3350→15408→3220→8255→5347名，走势波动较大：2022年出现异常断档至15408名，2023年迅速回升至3220名，2024年 回落至8255名，2025年回升至5347名；近3年整体呈波动中后移趋势，2025年基准约5347名；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2024年均为23人，2025 年增至25人，2026年计划26人，较2025年小幅扩招1人（+4%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第103名→2022年第85名→2023年第83名→2024年第83名→2025年第61名→2026年第63名，近年排名显著提升，反映学校综合实力和声誉持续增强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要因2025年录取季在河北、河南等地位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档；抖音热度排名第1 03位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等偏低；投档异常文件显示2024–2025年连续低关注度断档信号，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用；第五轮学科评估数据 中未收录北京中医药大学，无法直接获取A类学科信息；但该校以中医学、中药学、针灸推拿学为核心特色，在中医药领域具有公认的领先地位和行业影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京市，在青海省招生占比极小（约0.4%），跨省报考的地域偏好因素不显著；中医学/临床医学类专业热度持续高热推荐（2023–2024年–82），护理学亦获推荐评价；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人（较2025年约47669人基本持平），按近年比例估算物理类约30600人，竞争基数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5347名、2026年小 幅扩招（+1人，+4%）使位次数字略增大、学校软科排名持续上升（61→63）增强吸引力使位次数字略减小、声誉偏负面信号对报考热度有一定抑制、中医学类专业社会热度持续偏 高吸引考生等因素，各因素相互对冲后整体偏向小幅正面。预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约5425名，区间4925–5925名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3350 → 15408 → 3220 → 8255 → 5347, showing significant fluctuations: an abnormal drop to 15408 in 2022, a rapid recovery to 3220 in 2023, a decline to 8255 in 2024, and a recovery to 5347 in 2025; overall, the trend over the past three years has been a fluctuating backward shift, with a baseline of approximately 5347 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province was 23 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 25 in 2025, and planned 26 in 2026, a slight expansion of 1 student (+4%) compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been rising: 103rd in 2021 → 85th in 2022 → 83rd in 2023 → 83rd in 2024 → 61st in 2025 → 63rd in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to a drop of over 500 places in Hebei and Henan provinces during the 2025 admission season, and gaps in the Chinese Medicine major in Heilongjiang, Jilin, and other provinces; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with moderately low short video exposure; abnormal filing documents show continuous low-attention gaps in 2024–2025, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Beijing University of Chinese Medicine, so A-level discipline information cannot be directly obtained; however, the university has a recognized leading position and industry influence in the fields of Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, and Acupuncture and Tuina.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, with a very small enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province (about 0.4%), so cross-province application regional preference factors are not significant; the popularity of Chinese Medicine/Clinical Medicine majors remains consistently high (2023–2024 –82), and Nursing also receives a recommended rating; the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (roughly unchanged from about 47,669 in 2025), with an estimated physics category of about 30,600 based on recent proportions, indicating a stable competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5347, a slight expansion in 2026 (+1 student, +4%) slightly increases the ranking number, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (61→63) enhances attractiveness and slightly decreases the ranking number, negative reputation signals somewhat suppress application enthusiasm, and the consistently high social popularity of Chinese Medicine majors attracts students, the various factors offset each other, resulting in a slightly positive overall outlook. The predicted lowest ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 is approximately 5425, with a range of 4925–5925.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4925–5925, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4925), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Medicine Leading Talent Training Program or Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine Hua Tuo Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5925), you should choose Tier 3 majors such as Nursing or Chinese Pharmaceutical Preparation as a stable option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 565 → (no data for 2022) → 729 → 908 → 928, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 363 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 928 places.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province was 3 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and 4 students in 2026, an increase of 1 student (+33%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that significantly boosts rankings.
3. [University Level] Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has been rising (63rd in 2026), enhancing the overall strength and brand influence of the university.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (multiple provinces experiencing gaps), with average Douyin popularity, which has a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Beijing University of Chinese Medicine, so A-class discipline information cannot be directly obtained.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, with very few liberal arts enrollment spots in Qinghai Province (3–4 students), so the impact of cross-province application location preference is not significant; the liberal arts majors offered are Acupuncture and Tuina, Law (Medical and Health), and Public Administration (Health Management), with stable popularity in related major categories; the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, with an estimated history category of about 17,376 based on recent proportions, roughly unchanged from 17,212 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 928, the 33% enrollment expansion in 2026 (3→4 students) significantly boosting the ranking number, the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising ranking, the enrollment expansion is the most important factor affecting rankings. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will be about 1,134, with a range of 850–1,418.
